title: JZK 1.5M RCA to 3.5mm aux cable, speaker wire to RCA red white connector plug, phono male cable to 3.5 audio jack, headphone jack to phono adapter lead, Hifi adaptor cable
features: This 3.5mm to 2x RCA audio cable, standard design with white and red L/R male plugs on one end and black 3.5 male auxiliary on the other end. This rca to aux cable is1.5 meters long, which can expand your activity radius and providing clear and reliable sound quality.
This phono to 3.5mm jack cable is used to connect a smartphone or tablet (which has 3.5 mm jack), or MP3 player to a speaker, stereo receiver, or other RCA-enabled devices.

The 3.5mm to rca audio cable can be used to connect old soundbar to TV. Connect a bluetooth APTX adaptor to a Pioneer CD receiver. Used to plug record player/phone/laptop into amplifier. Decent enough for a DD 5.1 surround system. It works well with various devices including old models of iPads and iPhones.
Allows you to connect a DVD player, TV, Wii box, video camera, VCR, or other equipment with legacy RCA connectors to speakers or AV receivers with a 3.5mm stereo mini-jack for audio only.
Note: When using the product, please avoid excessive bending and pulling to avoid damaging the product connector and the inside of the cable, which may affect the normal operation of the connection.
